Key.English: ELLIPSE or RECTANGLE marker names covering the barrage areas as strings ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Chinesesimp: 覆盖弹幕区域的 ELLIPSE 或 RECTANGLE 标记名称，格式为字符串 ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Chinese: 覆蓋彈幕區域的 ELLIPSE 或 RECTANGLE 標記名稱，格式為字符串 ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Czech: Názvy značek ELLIPSE nebo RECTANGLE pokrývající oblasti palby jako řetězce ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.French: Noms des marqueurs ELLIPSE ou RECTANGLE couvrant les zones de barrage sous forme de chaînes ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Spanish: Nombres de marcadores ELLIPSE o RECTANGLE que cubren las áreas de bombardeo como cadenas ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Italian: Nomi dei marcatori ELLIPSE o RECTANGLE che coprono le aree di sbarramento come stringhe ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Polish: Nazwy znaczników ELLIPSE lub RECTANGLE pokrywające obszary ostrzału jako ciągi znaków ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Portuguese: Nomes dos marcadores ELLIPSE ou RECTANGLE que cobrem as áreas de barragem como strings ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Russian: Имена маркеров ELLIPSE или RECTANGLE, покрывающих зоны обстрела, в виде строк ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.German: ELLIPSE- oder RECTANGLE-Markernamen, die die Sperrfeuerbereiche abdecken, als Strings ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Korean: 사격 구역을 덮는 ELLIPSE 또는 RECTANGLE 마커 이름 문자열 ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Japanese: 弾幕エリアをカバーする ELLIPSE または RECTANGLE マーカー名の文字列 ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']
Key.Turkish: Baraj alanlarını kapsayan ELLIPSE veya RECTANGLE işaretçi adları dizeleri ['Deadzone_1', 'Deadzone_2']

Key.English: Global delay between each shell barrage
Key.Chinesesimp: 每次炮火弹幕之间的全局延迟
Key.Chinese: 每次砲火彈幕之間的全局延遲
Key.Czech: Globální prodleva mezi jednotlivými salvami granátů
Key.French: Délai global entre chaque barrage d'obus
Key.Spanish: Retraso global entre cada ráfaga de proyectiles
Key.Italian: Ritardo globale tra ogni sbarramento di proiettili
Key.Polish: Globalne opóźnienie między każdą salwą pocisków
Key.Portuguese: Atraso global entre cada barragem de granadas
Key.Russian: Глобальная задержка между каждым артиллерийским обстрелом
Key.Korean: 각 포격 사이의 전역 지연 시간
Key.Japanese: 各弾幕間のグローバルな遅延時間
Key.Turkish: Her mermi barajı arasındaki küresel gecikme

Key.English: Pool of shell classnames to randomly use ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Chinesesimp: 随机使用的炮弹类名池 ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Chinese: 隨機使用的砲彈類名池 ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Czech: Seznam classnamů granátů pro náhodné použití ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.French: Liste des classnames d'obus à utiliser aléatoirement ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Spanish: Lista de classnames de proyectiles para usar aleatoriamente ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Italian: Elenco dei classname dei proiettili da usare casualmente ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Polish: Pula nazw klas pocisków do losowego użycia ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Portuguese: Pool de classnames de granadas para usar aleatoriamente ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Russian: Список классов снарядов для случайного использования ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.German: Pool von Granaten-Classnames zur zufälligen Verwendung ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Korean: 무작위로 사용할 포탄 클래스 이름 목록 ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Japanese: ランダムに使用する砲弾クラス名のプール ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']
Key.Turkish: Rastgele kullanılacak mermi sınıf adları havuzu ['Sh_82mm_AMOS', 'Sh_155mm_AMOS']

Key.English: Radius of target area in meters
Key.Chinesesimp: 目标区域半径（以米为单位）
Key.Chinese: 目標區域半徑（以米為單位）
Key.French: Rayon de la zone cible en mètres
Key.Spanish: Radio del área objetivo en metros
Key.Portuguese: Raio da área alvo em metros
Key.Japanese: ターゲットエリアの半径（メートル）

Key.English: How many rounds are fired each barrage
Key.Czech: Kolik ran je vystřeleno při každé salvě
Key.French: Nombre de coups tirés lors de chaque barrage
Key.Spanish: Cuántos disparos se realizan en cada bombardeo
Key.Italian: Quanti colpi vengono sparati per ogni sbarramento
Key.Polish: Ile pocisków jest wystrzeliwanych w każdej salwie
Key.Portuguese: Quantos disparos são feitos em cada barragem
Key.Russian: Сколько выстрелов производится при каждом обстреле
Key.German: Wie viele Schüsse pro Sperrfeuer abgefeuert werden
Key.Japanese: 各弾幕で発射される弾丸の数
